title: meibomia axillaris
intro: Meibomia axillaris, also known as Buttonbush, is a flowering shrub native to the southeastern United States, characterized by its unique spherical flowers. The plant has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Meibomia axillaris have been traditionally used to treat fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, while also providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Meibomia axillaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, offering a natural remedy for various health concerns.
